new_value: Replaced coarse TX serialization with per-entry TxReservation in tx_queue.py and link_layer.py (protected in-flight entries, per-send completion via wait(), complete_reservation for stats/retry, _tx_lock for radio serialization). Updated drain_tx_queue, push/pop_reservation, preempt logic. Ruff clean, tx_queue tests pass (33/33). Added concurrency/cancellation support for bridge background tasks. Ready for review.
